name: Industrial Digital Thermometer — High Precision
tagline: -150 °C to +1300 °C industrial K-type thermocouple thermometer with 0.1 °C / 1 °C resolution, Min/Max/Avg hold and 2000-count HD display.
description: The Vartech V 6500 is a high-precision, high-stability industrial digital thermometer covering -150 °C to +1300 °C (-238 °F to +2372 °F) using K-type thermocouple probes. The 2000-count 3½-digit display offers selectable 0.1 °C and 1 °C resolution. A Bead-type K probe (-50 °C to 250 °C) is included; a Rod-type probe (-50 °C to 750 °C) and a High-Temperature probe (-50 °C to 1300 °C) are available as optional accessories. Functions include Data Hold, Min/Max/Avg memory, Auto Power Off, low battery indicator and over-range / sensor open indication. The bead probe tip is 1.25 mm diameter, 97 cm long (excluding plug); the rod probe sensor is 3 mm diameter, 7.5 cm sensor length with 135 cm flexible total length (excluding plug).
features: K-type thermocouple — Bead probe included (-50 °C to 250 °C)
Rod probe optional (-50 °C to 750 °C)  |  High-temp probe optional (up to 1300 °C)
Min / Max / Avg hold  |  Data Hold
Low battery indicator  |  Over-range & sensor-open indication
Auto Power Off  |  Powered by 2 × AAA batteries

name: Compact Thermo-Hygrometer with Clock
tagline: Compact desktop thermo-hygrometer — -10 °C to +50 °C temperature, 20–90 % RH humidity, 12/24-hour clock, comfort level display and Min/Max memory.
description: The Vartech THM S1 is a compact digital thermo-hygrometer with a built-in 12/24-hour clock. It simultaneously displays temperature (-10 °C to +50 °C / +14 °F to +122 °F), relative humidity (20–90 % RH) and the current time on a 3-line LCD. A comfort level indicator visually signals whether ambient conditions are comfortable. Min./Max. memory records the extremes of both temperature and humidity. °C / °F switching allows use with either scale. At just 9.8 × 5.8 × 1.3 cm it is well-suited for home, office, storage rooms, server rooms and any space where temperature and humidity monitoring is required. Powered by a single 1.5 V AAA battery. Note: this is a consumer-grade instrument and not intended for industrial applications.
features: 3-line display — Temperature, Humidity and Clock simultaneously
Min. / Max. memory for temperature and humidity
Compact size: 9.8 × 5.8 × 1.3 cm  |  1 × 1.5 V AAA battery
